meta.title: Global Accounting & Finance Degree | Placement Assistance
meta.description: Master global business and accounting principles with B.Com in International Finance & Accounting at Teksversity. Learn IFRS, taxation, auditing, and analytics.

@graph.name: B.Com in International Finance & Accounting
@graph.description: Explore the B.Com in International Finance & Accounting program at Teksversity. Learn global accounting standards, IFRS, international taxation, and financial management with expert mentors and 100% placement support.

mainEntity.name: What is B.Com in International Finance and Accounting?

acceptedAnswer.text: B.Com in International Finance and Accounting is a three-year undergraduate degree that focuses on global accounting standards, international taxation, and financial management. It prepares students for careers in multinational organizations, audit firms, and finance consultancies.

mainEntity.name: What subjects are taught in B.Com International Finance and Accounting?

acceptedAnswer.text: The program includes Financial Reporting, International Accounting Standards (IFRS), Global Taxation, Risk Management, Business Analysis, and Corporate Governance, along with practical exposure to financial modeling and analytics tools.

mainEntity.name: What is the career scope of B.Com in International Finance and Accounting?

acceptedAnswer.text: Graduates can work as Financial Analysts, Global Accountants, Tax Consultants, Risk Managers, or Audit Associates in multinational corporations, investment firms, and Big 4 companies like Deloitte, PwC, EY, and KPMG.

mainEntity.name: What is the difference between B.Com Accounting and B.Com International Finance and Accounting?

acceptedAnswer.text: While B.Com Accounting focuses on domestic accounting principles, B.Com International Finance and Accounting emphasizes global finance systems, IFRS, and cross-border taxation, preparing students for international career opportunities.

mainEntity.name: Can I pursue global certifications after completing B.Com in International Finance and Accounting?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, this program aligns with ACCA (UK), CPA (USA), and CMA (USA) certifications, enabling students to gain global recognition and higher earning potential in finance and accounting fields.

mainEntity.name: Why should I choose Teksversity for B.Com in International Finance and Accounting?

acceptedAnswer.text: Teksversity provides an internationally aligned curriculum designed by finance experts, offering ACCA-integrated training, live global finance projects, and personalized mentorship to prepare students for international accounting roles.

mainEntity.name: From which university will I receive my B.Com degree at Teksversity?

acceptedAnswer.text: The B.Com degree is awarded by a UGC-recognized university partner, ensuring global acceptance for employment, ACCA progression, or postgraduate studies abroad.

mainEntity.name: Does Teksversity provide training for ACCA or CPA exams?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Teksversity's program is mapped with the ACCA syllabus, providing integrated coaching and mentoring from ACCA-qualified trainers to help students clear international finance exams easily.

mainEntity.name: What kind of placement opportunities are available after completing this course at Teksversity?

acceptedAnswer.text: Teksversity provides 100% placement support in global audit firms, multinational corporations, and finance consultancies. Students also receive LinkedIn optimization, interview preparation, and recruiter access for international career placements.

mainEntity.name: Does Teksversity offer internships or live finance projects in this specialization?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, students get practical exposure through international finance case studies, corporate simulations, and internship opportunities with audit firms and global financial service providers.

heading: Overview of
B.Com in International Finance & Accounting Program
overViewOfOnline.subHeading: Become a Global Finance & Accounting Professional

content.value: & Accounting program at Teksversity is designed to prepare students for careers in international business, finance, and accounting. The curriculum integrates global financial principles with modern business practices, helping learners understand how multinational corporations manage, audit, and report their financial operations. This program provides in-depth knowledge of International Financial Reporting Standards (IFRS), taxation, auditing, and business analytics, empowering students to work across international markets. Learners develop a solid grasp of financial strategy and decision-making through interactive sessions, live projects, and case-based learning.

keyPoints: Understand core concepts in finance, accounting, and auditing
Gain proficiency in IFRS and global financial standards
Learn to analyze, interpret, and manage financial data
Develop skills in international taxation and compliance
Build readiness for global certifications and finance careers

heading: Why Choose B.Com in International Finance in
Teksversity?
whyOnline.initialDescription: Choosing Teksversity means gaining access to a globally oriented, industry-aligned education that bridges academic excellence with practical financial experience. The program ensures that learners not only master theoretical finance but also acquire the skills to implement them in real-world corporate environments.

description.firstDescription: Our unique learning model emphasizes hands-on projects, case-based studies, and interactive finance labs, ensuring that every student is career-ready. With mentorship from finance professionals and industry experts, students develop strategic financial thinking and global business perspective.

description.secondDescription: Beyond academics, Teksversity provides placement support, career mentorship, and certification guidance equipping learners with the tools to excel in the competitive financial world.

heading: Key Highlights of
B.Com in International Finance & Accounting Program

keyPoints: Global finance case studies and simulations
Technical and financial concept support desk
Mock interviews and finance domain GD sessions
Personalized career counseling and goal mapping
Internship tie-ups with audit and finance firms

heading: Download Our
Course Brochure
downloadOurCourseBrochure.description:
Get complete insights into the B.Com in International Finance & Accounting program at Teksversity your pathway to building a successful career in global business and finance. Explore how our modern curriculum combines theoretical depth with real-world financial applications.
Our brochure provides a comprehensive overview of course modules, learning outcomes, and career opportunities available after graduation. It highlights how Teksversity’s mentorship, hands-on projects, and industry exposure prepare students for successful global finance careers

Global career opportunities and professional pathways

heading: Teksversity
Online Admission Process
OnlineAdmissionProcedure.description: Starting your academic journey is now simpler than ever with our streamlined online admission process. This guide outlines the straightforward steps, from creating your personal student account and submitting basic application details to uploading necessary documents and completing the secure fee payment, all leading to a quick verification and instant admission confirmation.

testimonialCards.name: Vishal
testimonialCards.review: I took a Data science with ai , IIT Certification course and tejaswi mam helped me to get into the Best course, now I got a job in Accent company with 6.5lpa. Thank you Teksversity Team and special thanks to madam .

testimonialCards.name: Vinitha P
testimonialCards.review: This Dual Certification course in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics is fantastic. The trainers are knowledgeable and the practical projects helped me apply concepts effectively. A must for anyone looking to excel in marketing and analytics!

testimonialCards.name: sadhana chittennoju
testimonialCards.review: I enrolled in the online Data Science course at Teksversity in March 2025. The Python, ML modules, real-world projects, and weekly assignments were very useful. Good placement support. It helped me build a strong portfolio. Great for career switchers

testimonialCards.name: Arun Pasunuri
testimonialCards.course: Data Science with AI and ML
testimonialCards.review: Joining TEKSVERSITY changed the way I learn. The dual certification programs boosted my confidence, and the hands-on training gave me real industry experience. Their zero down-payment EMI support truly helps students. TEKSVERSITY inspires you to grow.

testimonialCards.name: Ramadevi Koduri
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is the best place to learn dual certification in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics. I wanted to study two relevant courses for my MBA, and their counsellor guided me perfectly. I enrolled in both programs with confidence.

testimonialCards.name: Meghana
testimonialCards.review: My experience with Teksversity was amazing! The counselling session with Sireesha Reddy ma’am at Secunderabad helped me choose the right course. She patiently cleared all my doubts and gave great career clarity.

testimonialCards.name: Divya Peddiwar
testimonialCards.course: Data Science and Python full stack
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is where growth meets opportunity! Their dual courses and online degree programs helped me learn in multiple directions. The mentors boosted my skills and confidence, and the experience truly transformed the way I learn.

testimonialCards.name: Gayathri Prayaga
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity Education Institution exceeded my expectations! The faculty is knowledgeable and supportive. The curriculum is relevant and industry-focused. I appreciated the career services and opportunities provided. Highly recommended!

testimonialCards.name: Raghavenderan G
testimonialCards.review: Great institute with quality education at an affordable price. They offer trending, industry-ready courses and practical, supportive teaching. Their tie-ups with top universities add huge value. Highly recommended for strong learning and career growth.

testimonialCards.name: Laxmi Gayathri Chelimeda
testimonialCards.review: I took the Data Science course at Teksversity and gained strong practical, hands-on knowledge. The mentors were very supportive and explained concepts clearly. I’m also grateful for the career opportunity I received. A great learning experience
